testsuite.name: registration.ParaBank Account Registration, Sign-In, and Security Validation

testcase.classname: registration.ParaBank Account Registration, Sign-In, and Security Validation
testcase.name: Successful User Registration, Sign-In, and Balance Retrieval
testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin
@TC_PB_01 @positive @registration @login Scenario: Successful User Registration, Sign-In, and Balance Retrieval Given the user opens the ParaBank application ... passed in 3.121s When the user navigates to the registration page ... passed in 1.444s And the user registers a new account with dynamic valid credentials ... passed in 18.141s Then the registration confirmation message should contain "Your account was created successfully. You are now logged in." ... passed in 0.036s When the user logs out of the application ... passed in 1.684s And the user logs in with the newly registered credentials ... passed in 5.961s Then the user should see their accounts overview dashboard ... passed in 0.027s And the user logs the account balance displayed on the page ... passed in 0.054s
@scenario.end --------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Captured stdout:
[SCENARIO] Starting scenario: Successful User Registration, Sign-In, and Balance Retrieval [ENV] Starting browser context... [BROWSER] Initializing Playwright engine... [BROWSER] Launching CHROMIUM (Headless=False, SlowMo=500ms)... [BROWSER] Creating browser context... [BROWSER] Opening page viewport...
================================================== PLAYWRIGHT BROWSER LAUNCHED ================================================== Browser Engine : CHROMIUM Headless Mode : False Slow Motion Delay : 500 ms Default Timeout : 30000 ms Keep Browser Open : False Video Recording : Enabled Launch Status : Asserted & Verified ==================================================
[SCENARIO] Finished scenario: Successful User Registration, Sign-In, and Balance Retrieval | Status: PASSED
[ENV] Screenshot saved to: /Users/myfolder/ParaBank/proof/screenshots/successful_user_registration,_sign-in,_and_balance_retrieval_passed.png [ENV] Closing browser session... [ENV] Video recording saved to: /Users/myfolder/ParaBank/proof/videos/successful_user_registration,_sign-in,_and_balance_retrieval_passed.webm
>>> [STEP] Given the user opens the ParaBank application [CONFIG] Active Environment: QA | Target URL: https://parabank.parasoft.com/parabank/index.htm?ConnType=JDBC [BASE PAGE] Navigating to: https://parabank.parasoft.com/parabank/index.htm?ConnType=JDBC
================================================================================ VALIDATION REPORT: APPLICATION LANDING & HOMEPAGE OPEN ================================================================================ CHECKPOINT / COMPONENT | EXPECTED | ACTUAL | STATUS ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Landing Page URL (contains) | index.htm | https://parabank.parasoft.com/parabank/index.htm?ConnType=JDBC | [PASS] Landing Page HTML Title | ParaBank | Welcome | Online Banking | ParaBank | Welcome | Online Banking | [PASS] ================================================================================
[SUCCESS] ParaBank homepage loaded and validated successfully.
>>> [STEP] When the user navigates to the registration page [LOGIN PAGE] Clicking Register Link... [BASE PAGE] Successfully clicked element using: 'a:has-text('Register')' [REGISTER PAGE] Waiting for registration form to load...
================================================================================ VALIDATION REPORT: REGISTRATION PAGE NAVIGATION ================================================================================ CHECKPOINT / COMPONENT | EXPECTED | ACTUAL | STATUS ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Registration Page URL (contains) | register.htm | https://parabank.parasoft.com/parabank/register.htm;jsessionid=F11377812F61CBAFA268437600933B15 | [PASS] Registration Page HTML Title | ParaBank | Register for Free Online Account Access | ParaBank | Register for Free Online Account Access | [PASS] ================================================================================
[SUCCESS] Navigated to Registration page and form loaded successfully.
>>> [STEP] And the user registers a new account with dynamic valid credentials
================================================================================ DYNAMIC USER REGISTRATION DATA CONTAINER (POJO) ================================================================================ First Name : Poovarasan Last Name : S Address : 105,Aarthi Apartment, T Nagar City : Chennai State : Tamil Nadu Zip Code : 600017 Phone Number: 9879623639 SSN : 779-88-5955 Username : pb_9f6c16a96a Password : Pass_a2298880 ================================================================================
[REGISTER PAGE] Waiting for registration form to load... [REGISTER PAGE] Registering user username: pb_9f6c16a96a [BASE PAGE] Successfully filled element using: 'form#customerForm input[id='customer.firstName']' [BASE PAGE] Successfully filled element using: 'form#customerForm input[id='customer.lastName']' [BASE PAGE] Successfully filled element using: 'form#customerForm input[id='customer.address.street']' [BASE PAGE] Successfully filled element using: 'form#customerForm input[id='customer.address.city']' [BASE PAGE] Successfully filled element using: 'form#customerForm input[id='customer.address.state']' [BASE PAGE] Successfully filled element using: 'form#customerForm input[id='customer.address.zipCode']' [BASE PAGE] Successfully filled element using: 'form#customerForm input[id='customer.phoneNumber']' [BASE PAGE] Successfully filled element using: 'form#customerForm input[id='customer.ssn']' [BASE PAGE] Successfully filled element using: 'form#customerForm input[id='customer.username']' [BASE PAGE] Successfully filled element using: 'form#customerForm input[id='customer.password']' [BASE PAGE] Successfully filled element using: 'form#customerForm input[id='repeatedPassword']' [REGISTER PAGE] Submitted registration form via Enter keypress successfully. [SUCCESS] Registration form submitted successfully.
>>> [STEP] Then the registration confirmation message should contain 'Your account was created successfully. You are now logged in.' [BASE PAGE] Successfully retrieved text using: 'div[id='rightPanel'] p:has-text('Your account was created successfully')' [BASE PAGE] Successfully retrieved text using: 'div#rightPanel h1.title'
================================================================================ VALIDATION REPORT: REGISTRATION SUCCESS PAGE VERIFICATION ================================================================================ CHECKPOINT / COMPONENT | EXPECTED | ACTUAL | STATUS ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Registration Success URL | register.htm | https://parabank.parasoft.com/parabank/register.htm | [PASS] Registration Success HTML Title | ParaBank | Customer Created | ParaBank | Customer Created | [PASS] Welcome Heading Text | Welcome pb_9f6c16a96a | Welcome pb_9f6c16a96a | [PASS] Success Message Content | Your account was created successfully. You are now logged in. | Your account was created successfully. You are now logged in. | [PASS] ================================================================================
[SUCCESS] Registration confirmation and welcome header verified successfully.
>>> [STEP] When the user logs out of the application [LOGIN PAGE] Checking active session for logout... [LOGIN PAGE] Active session found. Logging out... [BASE PAGE] Successfully clicked element using: 'a:has-text('Log Out')'
================================================================================ VALIDATION REPORT: USER LOGOUT & SESSION TERMINATION ================================================================================ CHECKPOINT / COMPONENT | EXPECTED | ACTUAL | STATUS ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Home Landing URL (contains) | index.htm | https://parabank.parasoft.com/parabank/index.htm?ConnType=JDBC | [PASS] ================================================================================
[SUCCESS] Logged out and landed on home page successfully.
>>> [STEP] And the user logs in with the newly registered credentials [DATA] Retrying login with username: pb_9f6c16a96a and password: Pass_a2298880 [CONFIG] Active Environment: QA | Target URL: https://parabank.parasoft.com/parabank/index.htm?ConnType=JDBC [BASE PAGE] Navigating to: https://parabank.parasoft.com/parabank/index.htm?ConnType=JDBC [LOGIN PAGE] Performing login for user: pb_9f6c16a96a [BASE PAGE] Successfully filled element using: 'input[name='username']' [BASE PAGE] Successfully filled element using: 'input[name='password']' [BASE PAGE] Successfully clicked element using: 'input[value='Log In']' [SUCCESS] Credentials entered and login submitted.
>>> [STEP] Then the user should see their accounts overview dashboard [ACCOUNTS PAGE] Waiting for Accounts Overview page to load... [BASE PAGE] Successfully retrieved text using: 'p.smallText'
================================================================================ VALIDATION REPORT: ACCOUNTS OVERVIEW DASHBOARD VERIFICATION ================================================================================ CHECKPOINT / COMPONENT | EXPECTED | ACTUAL | STATUS ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Dashboard URL (contains) | overview.htm | https://parabank.parasoft.com/parabank/overview.htm | [PASS] Dashboard HTML Title (contains) | ParaBank | Accounts Overview | ParaBank | Accounts Overview | [PASS] Left Panel Welcome Text | Welcome Poovarasan S | Welcome Poovarasan S | [PASS] ================================================================================
[SUCCESS] Accounts overview page and session verified successfully.
>>> [STEP] And the user logs the account balance displayed on the page [ACCOUNTS PAGE] Waiting for Accounts Overview page to load... [ACCOUNTS PAGE] Found 2 table rows. Extracting cell details... [ACCOUNTS PAGE] Waiting for Accounts Overview page to load... [ACCOUNTS PAGE] Total Balance identified: $515.50
================================================================================ PARABANK SECURE ACCOUNTS LEDGER ================================================================================ 01. Account Reference : 16896 Ledger Balance : $515.50 Available Fund : $515.50 -------------------------------------------------------------------------------- AUDITED TOTAL BALANCE IN PORTAL: $515.50 ================================================================================
[SUCCESS] Account balances fetched, verified, and audited successfully.

testcase.classname: registration.ParaBank Account Registration, Sign-In, and Security Validation
testcase.name: Failed Registration - Password Mismatch validation
testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin
@TC_PB_02 @negative @registration Scenario: Failed Registration - Password Mismatch validation Given the user opens the ParaBank application ... passed in 2.251s When the user navigates to the registration page ... passed in 1.430s And the user attempts registration with mismatched passwords ... passed in 18.107s Then registration fails showing error "Passwords did not match." ... passed in 0.021s
@scenario.end --------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Captured stdout:
[SCENARIO] Starting scenario: Failed Registration - Password Mismatch validation [ENV] Starting browser context... [BROWSER] Initializing Playwright engine... [BROWSER] Launching CHROMIUM (Headless=False, SlowMo=500ms)... [BROWSER] Creating browser context... [BROWSER] Opening page viewport...
================================================== PLAYWRIGHT BROWSER LAUNCHED ================================================== Browser Engine : CHROMIUM Headless Mode : False Slow Motion Delay : 500 ms Default Timeout : 30000 ms Keep Browser Open : False Video Recording : Enabled Launch Status : Asserted & Verified ==================================================
[SCENARIO] Finished scenario: Failed Registration - Password Mismatch validation | Status: PASSED
[ENV] Screenshot saved to: /Users/myfolder/ParaBank/proof/screenshots/failed_registration_-_password_mismatch_validation_passed.png [ENV] Closing browser session... [ENV] Video recording saved to: /Users/myfolder/ParaBank/proof/videos/failed_registration_-_password_mismatch_validation_passed.webm
>>> [STEP] Given the user opens the ParaBank application [CONFIG] Active Environment: QA | Target URL: https://parabank.parasoft.com/parabank/index.htm?ConnType=JDBC [BASE PAGE] Navigating to: https://parabank.parasoft.com/parabank/index.htm?ConnType=JDBC
================================================================================ VALIDATION REPORT: APPLICATION LANDING & HOMEPAGE OPEN ================================================================================ CHECKPOINT / COMPONENT | EXPECTED | ACTUAL | STATUS ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Landing Page URL (contains) | index.htm | https://parabank.parasoft.com/parabank/index.htm?ConnType=JDBC | [PASS] Landing Page HTML Title | ParaBank | Welcome | Online Banking | ParaBank | Welcome | Online Banking | [PASS] ================================================================================
[SUCCESS] ParaBank homepage loaded and validated successfully.
>>> [STEP] When the user navigates to the registration page [LOGIN PAGE] Clicking Register Link... [BASE PAGE] Successfully clicked element using: 'a:has-text('Register')' [REGISTER PAGE] Waiting for registration form to load...
================================================================================ VALIDATION REPORT: REGISTRATION PAGE NAVIGATION ================================================================================ CHECKPOINT / COMPONENT | EXPECTED | ACTUAL | STATUS ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Registration Page URL (contains) | register.htm | https://parabank.parasoft.com/parabank/register.htm;jsessionid=C237E20EE71771B82E3110F10375A1AB | [PASS] Registration Page HTML Title | ParaBank | Register for Free Online Account Access | ParaBank | Register for Free Online Account Access | [PASS] ================================================================================
[SUCCESS] Navigated to Registration page and form loaded successfully.
>>> [STEP] And the user attempts registration with mismatched passwords [REGISTER PAGE] Waiting for registration form to load... [REGISTER PAGE] Registering user username: pb_66ea31cb8b [BASE PAGE] Successfully filled element using: 'form#customerForm input[id='customer.firstName']' [BASE PAGE] Successfully filled element using: 'form#customerForm input[id='customer.lastName']' [BASE PAGE] Successfully filled element using: 'form#customerForm input[id='customer.address.street']' [BASE PAGE] Successfully filled element using: 'form#customerForm input[id='customer.address.city']' [BASE PAGE] Successfully filled element using: 'form#customerForm input[id='customer.address.state']' [BASE PAGE] Successfully filled element using: 'form#customerForm input[id='customer.address.zipCode']' [BASE PAGE] Successfully filled element using: 'form#customerForm input[id='customer.phoneNumber']' [BASE PAGE] Successfully filled element using: 'form#customerForm input[id='customer.ssn']' [BASE PAGE] Successfully filled element using: 'form#customerForm input[id='customer.username']' [BASE PAGE] Successfully filled element using: 'form#customerForm input[id='customer.password']' [BASE PAGE] Successfully filled element using: 'form#customerForm input[id='repeatedPassword']' [REGISTER PAGE] Submitted registration form via Enter keypress successfully. [SUCCESS] Registration form submitted with password mismatch.
>>> [STEP] Then registration fails showing error 'Passwords did not match.' [BASE PAGE] Successfully retrieved text using: 'span.error'
================================================================================ VALIDATION REPORT: REGISTRATION FAILURE - PASSWORD MISMATCH ================================================================================ CHECKPOINT / COMPONENT | EXPECTED | ACTUAL | STATUS ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Registration Form URL (contains) | register.htm | https://parabank.parasoft.com/parabank/register.htm | [PASS] Form Validation Error (contains) | Passwords did not match. | Passwords did not match. | [PASS] ================================================================================
[SUCCESS] Registration password mismatch error successfully verified.

testcase.classname: registration.ParaBank Account Registration, Sign-In, and Security Validation
testcase.name: Failed Registration - Missing Required Fields validation
testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin
@TC_PB_03 @negative @registration Scenario: Failed Registration - Missing Required Fields validation Given the user opens the ParaBank application ... passed in 3.238s When the user navigates to the registration page ... passed in 1.435s And the user attempts registration with missing first name and username fields ... passed in 18.091s Then registration fails showing field warning "First name is required." or "Username is required." ... passed in 0.051s
@scenario.end --------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Captured stdout:
[SCENARIO] Starting scenario: Failed Registration - Missing Required Fields validation [ENV] Starting browser context... [BROWSER] Initializing Playwright engine... [BROWSER] Launching CHROMIUM (Headless=False, SlowMo=500ms)... [BROWSER] Creating browser context... [BROWSER] Opening page viewport...
================================================== PLAYWRIGHT BROWSER LAUNCHED ================================================== Browser Engine : CHROMIUM Headless Mode : False Slow Motion Delay : 500 ms Default Timeout : 30000 ms Keep Browser Open : False Video Recording : Enabled Launch Status : Asserted & Verified ==================================================

[ENV] Screenshot saved to: /Users/myfolder/ParaBank/proof/screenshots/failed_registration_-_missing_required_fields_validation_passed.png [ENV] Closing browser session... [ENV] Video recording saved to: /Users/myfolder/ParaBank/proof/videos/failed_registration_-_missing_required_fields_validation_passed.webm
>>> [STEP] Given the user opens the ParaBank application [CONFIG] Active Environment: QA | Target URL: https://parabank.parasoft.com/parabank/index.htm?ConnType=JDBC [BASE PAGE] Navigating to: https://parabank.parasoft.com/parabank/index.htm?ConnType=JDBC
================================================================================ VALIDATION REPORT: APPLICATION LANDING & HOMEPAGE OPEN ================================================================================ CHECKPOINT / COMPONENT | EXPECTED | ACTUAL | STATUS ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Landing Page URL (contains) | index.htm | https://parabank.parasoft.com/parabank/index.htm?ConnType=JDBC | [PASS] Landing Page HTML Title | ParaBank | Welcome | Online Banking | ParaBank | Welcome | Online Banking | [PASS] ================================================================================
[SUCCESS] ParaBank homepage loaded and validated successfully.
>>> [STEP] When the user navigates to the registration page [LOGIN PAGE] Clicking Register Link... [BASE PAGE] Successfully clicked element using: 'a:has-text('Register')' [REGISTER PAGE] Waiting for registration form to load...
================================================================================ VALIDATION REPORT: REGISTRATION PAGE NAVIGATION ================================================================================ CHECKPOINT / COMPONENT | EXPECTED | ACTUAL | STATUS ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Registration Page URL (contains) | register.htm | https://parabank.parasoft.com/parabank/register.htm;jsessionid=3A4D7A09162DFAF305A894A16B106DEE | [PASS] Registration Page HTML Title | ParaBank | Register for Free Online Account Access | ParaBank | Register for Free Online Account Access | [PASS] ================================================================================
[SUCCESS] Navigated to Registration page and form loaded successfully.
>>> [STEP] And the user attempts registration with missing fields [REGISTER PAGE] Waiting for registration form to load... [REGISTER PAGE] Registering user username: [BASE PAGE] Successfully filled element using: 'form#customerForm input[id='customer.firstName']' [BASE PAGE] Successfully filled element using: 'form#customerForm input[id='customer.lastName']' [BASE PAGE] Successfully filled element using: 'form#customerForm input[id='customer.address.street']' [BASE PAGE] Successfully filled element using: 'form#customerForm input[id='customer.address.city']' [BASE PAGE] Successfully filled element using: 'form#customerForm input[id='customer.address.state']' [BASE PAGE] Successfully filled element using: 'form#customerForm input[id='customer.address.zipCode']' [BASE PAGE] Successfully filled element using: 'form#customerForm input[id='customer.phoneNumber']' [BASE PAGE] Successfully filled element using: 'form#customerForm input[id='customer.ssn']' [BASE PAGE] Successfully filled element using: 'form#customerForm input[id='customer.username']' [BASE PAGE] Successfully filled element using: 'form#customerForm input[id='customer.password']' [BASE PAGE] Successfully filled element using: 'form#customerForm input[id='repeatedPassword']' [REGISTER PAGE] Submitted registration form via Enter keypress successfully. [SUCCESS] Registration form submitted with missing fields.
>>> [STEP] Then registration fails showing error 'First name is required.' or 'Username is required.' [BASE PAGE] Successfully retrieved text using: 'span.error'
================================================================================ VALIDATION REPORT: REGISTRATION FAILURE - MISSING MANDATORY FIELDS ================================================================================ CHECKPOINT / COMPONENT | EXPECTED | ACTUAL | STATUS ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Registration Form URL (contains) | register.htm | https://parabank.parasoft.com/parabank/register.htm | [PASS] Validation Error (contains 'First name is required.' or 'Username is required.') | 'First name is required.' | 'Username is required.' | First name is required. | [PASS] ================================================================================
[SUCCESS] Verified missing field validation warning presence successfully.

testcase.classname: registration.ParaBank Account Registration, Sign-In, and Security Validation
testcase.name: Failed Sign-In - Invalid username and password credentials
testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin
@TC_PB_04 @negative @login Scenario: Failed Sign-In - Invalid username and password credentials Given the user opens the ParaBank application ... passed in 1.955s When the user attempts login with invalid credentials "nonexistent_test_user" and "WrongPassword99!" ... passed in 5.553s Then login fails showing error "The username and password could not be verified." ... passed in 0.046s
@scenario.end --------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Captured stdout:
[SCENARIO] Starting scenario: Failed Sign-In - Invalid username and password credentials [ENV] Starting browser context... [BROWSER] Initializing Playwright engine... [BROWSER] Launching CHROMIUM (Headless=False, SlowMo=500ms)... [BROWSER] Creating browser context... [BROWSER] Opening page viewport...
================================================== PLAYWRIGHT BROWSER LAUNCHED ================================================== Browser Engine : CHROMIUM Headless Mode : False Slow Motion Delay : 500 ms Default Timeout : 30000 ms Keep Browser Open : False Video Recording : Enabled Launch Status : Asserted & Verified ==================================================
[SCENARIO] Finished scenario: Failed Sign-In - Invalid username and password credentials | Status: PASSED
[ENV] Screenshot saved to: /Users/myfolder/ParaBank/proof/screenshots/failed_sign-in_-_invalid_username_and_password_credentials_passed.png [ENV] Closing browser session... [ENV] Video recording saved to: /Users/myfolder/ParaBank/proof/videos/failed_sign-in_-_invalid_username_and_password_credentials_passed.webm
>>> [STEP] Given the user opens the ParaBank application [CONFIG] Active Environment: QA | Target URL: https://parabank.parasoft.com/parabank/index.htm?ConnType=JDBC [BASE PAGE] Navigating to: https://parabank.parasoft.com/parabank/index.htm?ConnType=JDBC
================================================================================ VALIDATION REPORT: APPLICATION LANDING & HOMEPAGE OPEN ================================================================================ CHECKPOINT / COMPONENT | EXPECTED | ACTUAL | STATUS ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Landing Page URL (contains) | index.htm | https://parabank.parasoft.com/parabank/index.htm?ConnType=JDBC | [PASS] Landing Page HTML Title | ParaBank | Welcome | Online Banking | ParaBank | Welcome | Online Banking | [PASS] ================================================================================
[SUCCESS] ParaBank homepage loaded and validated successfully.
>>> [STEP] When the user attempts login with invalid credentials 'nonexistent_test_user' [CONFIG] Active Environment: QA | Target URL: https://parabank.parasoft.com/parabank/index.htm?ConnType=JDBC [BASE PAGE] Navigating to: https://parabank.parasoft.com/parabank/index.htm?ConnType=JDBC [LOGIN PAGE] Performing login for user: nonexistent_test_user [BASE PAGE] Successfully filled element using: 'input[name='username']' [BASE PAGE] Successfully filled element using: 'input[name='password']' [BASE PAGE] Successfully clicked element using: 'input[value='Log In']' [SUCCESS] Submitted login with invalid credentials.
>>> [STEP] Then login fails showing error 'The username and password could not be verified.' [LOGIN PAGE] Error message retrieved: 'The username and password could not be verified.'
================================================================================ VALIDATION REPORT: SIGN-IN FAILURE - INVALID CREDENTIALS ================================================================================ CHECKPOINT / COMPONENT | EXPECTED | ACTUAL | STATUS ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Current URL | N/A | https://parabank.parasoft.com/parabank/login.htm | [PASS] Login Error Message (contains 'The username and password could not be verified.') | The username and password could not be verified. | The username and password could not be verified. | [PASS] ================================================================================
[SUCCESS] Login error message verified successfully.
